project_summary: The project is to develop a Web Store / WebOrder system, an e-commerce platform for customers, administrators, and salespersons. Key features include user account management, product browsing, a shopping cart, order processing with credit card validation, and email notifications. The system has specific requirements for performance, security, availability, and maintainability, and must operate on a defined technology stack including Linux, Apache, and a SQL database.

functional.text: The system shall provide online help for users via the web interface and deliver an Operations and Maintenance manual, Users Guide, and Installation Instructions for the Administrator.
The system shall validate credit cards against fraud.
For returning customers, the system shall validate the existing credit card in the system after each log in.
The system shall automatically compress image files that are too large in size.
The system shall validate the existence of email addresses.
The system shall create logs of all changes, updates, or fixes that are done to the site.
The system shall be able to run test credit card transactions.
The system shall be able to run test shipping orders.
The system shall be able to create a test environment of the WebOrder system.
The system shall allow a customer to add items to the shopping cart.
The system shall allow an administrator to register a new customer, sales person, or administrator account.

non_functional.text: Upon the USB being plugged in, the system shall be deployed and operational in less than 1 minute.
The system shall be able to handle 1000 customers logged in concurrently.
The system shall be able to retrieve 200 products per second.
The system shall be able to add a product to the shopping cart in less than 2ms.
The system shall be able to search for a specified product in less than 1 second.
The system shall be able to email a customer and vendor in less than 1 second.
The system shall be able to validate a credit card in less than 2 seconds.
The system shall be able to acquire shipping charges in less than 2 seconds.
The system shall be able to restore 1000 records per second.
The system shall perform searches via Dijkstra's shortest path algorithm.
The system shall encrypt all sensitive information via HTTPS.
The system shall encrypt all customer data in the database.
The system shall automatically detect IP DOS attacks and block the IP.
The system shall detect consecutive failed login attempts.
The system shall be protected by the open-source firewall Firestarter.
The system shall have an availability of 99.99%.
The user interface must remain consistent among various web browsers and be intuitive to the customer.
The system shall utilize consistent symbols and colors for clear notifications.
The system shall utilize interchangeable plugins.
The system shall be easily updatable for fixes and patches.
The system shall be easy to upgrade.
The system should be able to run under debug mode.
The system hardware shall be fixed and patched via an internet connection.
The system shall be extremely portable via the USB drive.
The system shall be easy to migrate or back up via another USB drive.

data.text: The system shall use a SQL-based database to store inventory information.

business_rules.text: Yoggie shall coordinate on future enhancement and features with our organization.
Customers must be able to access the web order system via a web browser with HTTPS.
A customer account must already be registered for use.
A customer must be logged-in on the system.
To add an item to the cart, the customer must be logged-in on the system.
An administrator account must already be registered for use.
An administrator must be logged-in on the system.
An administrator must be able to access the weborder system via a web browser with HTTPS to add a user.
A Sales Person account must already be registered for use.
A Sales Person must be logged-in on the system.
A Sales Person must be able to access the weborder system via a web browser with HTTPS.

interfaces.text: The WebOrder system shall send an e-mail confirmation to the customer that the items they ordered will be delivered to the shipping address along with tracking number.
The system shall have a plug-ins interface.
The WebOrder system shall send an e-mail to the System Administrator regarding any technical queries from customers or sales people.

constraints.text: The Web Store shall operate with the following internet browsers: Microsoft Internet Explorer version 6 and 7, Netscape Communicator Version 4 and 5.
The Web Store shall operate on an Intel based system with Slackware Linux 2.6 and Apache Web Server.
The system must use a SQL based database.
